     model.load_state_dict(ckpt['model_state_dict'])

     model = model.to(device)

-    return [model], [1.0]

+    return model

+

+def predict_ensemble(models, weights, skill_ids, corrects, lengths, device, batch_size=128):

+    from torch.utils.data import TensorDataset, DataLoader

+    

+    T = skill_ids.shape[1]

+    mask = torch.arange(T - 1).unsqueeze(0) < (lengths.unsqueeze(1) - 1)

+    total_preds = mask.sum().item()

+    

+    all_weighted_probs = torch.zeros(total_preds, device=device)

+    

+    dataset = TensorDataset(skill_ids, corrects, lengths)

+    loader = DataLoader(dataset, batch_size=batch_size, shuffle=False)

+    

+    for model, weight in zip(models, weights):

+        model_probs = []

+        with torch.no_grad():

+            for s_batch, c_batch, l_batch in loader:

+                s_batch = s_batch.to(device)

+                c_batch = c_batch.to(device)

+                l_batch = l_batch.to(device)

+                

+                logits = model(s_batch, c_batch, l_batch)

+                pred_logits = logits[:, 1:]

+                probs = torch.sigmoid(pred_logits)

+                

+                T_b = c_batch.shape[1]

+                b_mask = torch.arange(T_b - 1, device=device).unsqueeze(0) < (l_batch.unsqueeze(1) - 1)

+                model_probs.append(probs[b_mask])

+        

+        model_probs = torch.cat(model_probs)

+        all_weighted_probs += weight * model_probs

+    

+    return all_weighted_probs.cpu().tolist()
